name: the-system-player
description: The System — Player Edition. Gamified job-search tracker in your own Notion (Quest Board, XP/levels, Gate Intel, Hunter Network). Commands: /awaken, /quest, /engage, /report, /log, /grind, /status, /intake, /appraise, /scout, /ghost, /forge, /armor, /raid, /respawn, /gather, /recruit, /touch, /patch, /levelup, /theme, /petition, /party, /vitals, /doctor, /browse. v1.2: adds a System Calendar delivery channel. IDs resolve via your Kernel.
